name: SBI Card ELITE

rewards.displayCategory: Grocery, dining, movies, and departmental stores

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.
international: Complimentary Priority Pass membership is provided with 6 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar year, capped at 2 visits per quarter.
Post the complimentary visits, lounge usage is charged at the programme's prevailing rate.

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh
10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 4 lakh
20,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh
10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
10,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 4 lakh
20,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
joiningBenefits: Welcome e-Gift Voucher worth Rs 5,000 from select brands such as Yatra, Bata/Hush Puppies, Marks & Spencer, Westside, and Shoppers Stop
additionalBenefits: Free movie tickets worth up to Rs 6,000 per year through BookMyShow
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card ELITE product page, ELITE terms booklet, customer notices page, rewards FAQ, and Priority Pass FAQ on 2026-06-08.
The current ELITE booklet reflects annual spend milestone slabs at Rs 2 lakh, Rs 3 lakh, Rs 4 lakh, and Rs 5 lakh, together totalling 50,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 12,500.
As per SBI Card notices effective 1 Apr 2026, statement credit redemption is restricted to multiples of 4,000 Reward Points and capped at 60,000 Reward Points per calendar month.
The card is audited from official SBI sources but is not yet marked as manually verified by user.
